channel.title: susi.vidal
channel.description: trying to make cooking fun stay horngry 📧: team@susividal.com

item.title: TBI updates! I wasn’t sure what to touch on (I’m still not) ...
item.description:
TBI updates! I wasn’t sure what to touch on (I’m still not) but this is a decent summary. The pain is slowly getting better but I still have a pretty long recovery ahead. I’ll most likely have concussion symptoms for at least 2 more months. I’m trying to focus on healing and doing whatever I can to have optimal recovery for my brain. I have a CT scan and follow ups soon. The neurologist was unsure when/and if I’ll receive my smell and taste back, he seemed more on the optimistic side though. Thanks to everyone reaching out and sending love. I’ve also been nonstop thinking of those who have experienced a TBI/severe concussion and mental health issues, sending you all love too ❤️ PS Sorry for Stella chewing her bone the entire time, it’s way louder than I expected LMAO
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Mac and cheese grilled cheese!!! This grilled cheese made with f...
item.description:
Mac and cheese grilled cheese!!! This grilled cheese made with full flavor Cheese and their new limited-edition Butternaise made all my dreams come true.   Butternaise sold out in minutes! Missed it? They gave me the recipe to make it on your own: 2 tbsp Tillamook extra creamy unsalted butter, softened 2tbsp mayo (organic Kewpie recommended) pinch of Spiceology Fry Seasoning
@Tillamook #TillamookPartner
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: My dream grilled cheese sandwich for Fall with !! It’s salty...
item.description:
My dream grilled cheese sandwich for Fall with !! It’s salty, sweet, creamy and tangy, the best combo :) Recipe can be found on Tillamook’s website!
@Tillamook #TillamookPartner
